prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to an environmental permit application overseen by the Environment Agency, which operates in England. It does not apply to Scotland, as environmental regulations and permit applications are managed by different bodies in Scotland, such as the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA).
